problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
mechanism: Mycorrhizal network enhancement for nutrient cycling
hypothesis: Mycorrhizal network enhancement for nutrient cycling may resolve How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Field pilot deployment with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
